data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior when an auto-offer occurs upon cancellation. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or outcomes related to the cancellation process or the auto-offer mechanism. The linked use case primarily focuses on booking and confirmation processes without addressing cancellation scenarios, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
gaps: No evidence of the auto-offer mechanism upon cancellation.
